industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: China Energine International (Holdings) Limited
summary: China Energine International (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, distributes, and sells wind energy related products in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It operates through Wind Energy Related Products and Operation of Wind Farm segments. The company provides wind turbine generators and blades; power systems of electric buses, electric passenger cars, electric sanitation trucks, electric mail vans, and other types of special-purpose vehicles for the automobile manufacture enterprises; and gearless motor machines. In addition, it manufactures wind turbines; sells electricity from the operation of wind power fields; distributes elevator and broadband products; manufactures and distributes telecommunication products; and rents properties. The company was formerly known as CASIL Telecommunications Holding Limited. China Energine International (Holdings) Limited was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong, and is considered a Red Chip company due to its listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. China Energine International (Holdings) Limited is a subsidiary of Astrotech Group Limited.
